adjusted.reasoning: Anchored to the market (bet365 FRA -225 / draw +350 / SEN +550 -> de-vig ~65/21/14). The model's 84% France is overconfident, consistent with MD1-MD2 calibration where the odds track beat the model on Brier (0.75 vs 1.06). France are at full strength (Mbappe, Dembele, Olise, Doue; Saliba over a minor knock), but Senegal are a serious side -- top of their qualifying group undefeated, with Mane, Sarr, Jackson, Koulibaly and Mendy, and a history of troubling France (2002). A narrow France win is the central case; this is no gimme.
